gift_card_products.name: $25 Digital Gift Card
gift_card_products.description: A $25 digital gift card delivered by email, redeemable for tickets, classes, or concessions.

gift_card_products.name: $75 Digital Gift Card
gift_card_products.description: Send a friend the gift of a night at the theatre with a $75 email gift voucher.

gift_card_products.name: Custom Amount Digital Gift Card
gift_card_products.description: Choose your own amount for a flexible digital gift card, delivered instantly by email.

gift_card_products.name: $50 Physical Gift Card
gift_card_products.description: A $50 gift card printed on a collectible card, available for pickup at the box office.

membership_tiers.name: 4-Show Flex Pass
membership_tiers.description: Enjoy any four mainstage productions in the season with flexible date selection and one guest ticket.
benefits: Admission to any 4 mainstage shows in the 2025–2026 season
One complimentary guest ticket to use on any performance (subject to availability)
No exchange fees when changing performance dates
Priority booking window before tickets go on sale to the public
10% discount on additional single tickets

membership_tiers.name: Supporter Membership
membership_tiers.description: Entry-level membership for frequent theatregoers with savings on three shows.
benefits: Admission to 3 mainstage productions
5% discount on additional ticket purchases
Recognition in the digital program
Members-only email offers

membership_tiers.name: Premier Season Membership
membership_tiers.description: Our best value: see the entire season, bring friends, and enjoy premium perks.
benefits: Admission to all 6 mainstage productions
Two complimentary guest tickets per season
Priority seating and early access to special events
15% discount on classes and workshops
Invitations to member receptions and talkbacks
Waived ticket exchange and service fees

membership_tiers.name: Family Package Membership
membership_tiers.description: Designed for households that love theatre, including family-friendly programming and guest passes.
benefits: 4 admissions per show to 4 family-friendly productions
Four guest passes usable on select performances
Discounts on youth education programs
Early registration access for camps and workshops
Exclusive family backstage open house event

productions.title: Charlotte's Web
productions.subtitle: A Heartwarming Tale of Friendship
productions.synopsis: E.B. White’s classic story comes to life onstage in this gentle, funny, and deeply moving adaptation. Join Wilbur, Charlotte, and their barnyard friends in a production perfect for first-time theatregoers and lifelong fans alike.
productions.age_recommendation: Recommended for ages 5 and up; ideal for families and school groups.

productions.title: Rooftop Romance
productions.subtitle: An Intimate Cabaret of Love Songs
productions.synopsis: Set under the city lights, this cabaret evening weaves together jazz standards, contemporary ballads, and original songs to tell interlocking stories of modern love.
productions.age_recommendation: Ages 18+ due to mature themes and language.

productions.title: Spring Fling: The Musical
productions.subtitle: A Pop-Powered Campus Comedy
productions.synopsis: Final exams, first crushes, and a campus-wide talent show collide in this high-energy original musical packed with pop, rock, and heartfelt ballads.
productions.age_recommendation: Best for ages 13 and up; some mild language and teen themes.

productions.title: Seaside Serenade
productions.subtitle: A Musical Postcard from the Shore
productions.synopsis: Every summer, the residents of a small seaside town gather on the boardwalk to sing, dance, and confront the tides of change. This original musical blends folk, indie pop, and choral harmonies.
productions.age_recommendation: All ages welcome; ideal for multi-generational audiences.

productions.title: Winter Tales
productions.subtitle: Three Short Plays for Long Nights
productions.synopsis: An evening of three original one-act plays exploring family, tradition, and resilience during the darkest days of the year.
productions.age_recommendation: Recommended for ages 14+ due to complex themes.

productions.title: First Fridays Improv Jam
productions.subtitle: Spontaneous Comedy with the House Troupe
productions.synopsis: Our resident improv ensemble takes suggestions from the audience and turns them into fast-paced scenes, songs, and games on the spot.
productions.age_recommendation: Ages 13+; content varies based on audience suggestions.

productions.title: Shakespeare in the Park: Much Ado About Nothing
productions.subtitle: A Sunlit Comedy of Wit and Romance
productions.synopsis: Pack a picnic and join us outdoors for a sparkling production of Shakespeare’s classic battle of words and hearts.

productions.title: Kids Take the Stage! Cabaret
productions.subtitle: Songs, Scenes, and Surprises by Young Performers
productions.synopsis: Our youth performers share highlights from the season’s classes and camps in a joyful, fast-paced showcase.
productions.age_recommendation: Perfect for ages 4 and up; short acts ideal for younger attention spans.

productions.title: Little Shop of Horrors
productions.subtitle: The Cult-Favorite Rock Musical
productions.synopsis: A down-on-his-luck floral assistant becomes an overnight sensation when he discovers a strange and unusual plant with a sinister secret.
productions.age_recommendation: Ages 13+; contains comic horror elements and mild language.

productions.title: Annie
productions.subtitle: The Sun-Will-Come-Out-Tomorrow Musical
productions.synopsis: The beloved Broadway classic about a plucky orphan searching for her family, featuring favorites like "Tomorrow" and "It’s the Hard Knock Life."

productions.title: Our Town
productions.subtitle: A Classic Portrait of Small-Town Life
productions.synopsis: Thornton Wilder’s timeless play about love, loss, and the beauty of ordinary days, presented with a stripped-down, ensemble-driven staging.

productions.title: Broadway Bound Cabaret
productions.subtitle: Songs from the Great White Way
productions.synopsis: Local vocalists share their favorite show tunes in an informal evening of Broadway hits and hidden gems.
productions.age_recommendation: Ages 10+; family-friendly songs with occasional mature themes introduced.

productions.title: Summer Stage: Teen Showcase
productions.subtitle: Scenes & Songs Created in Two Weeks
productions.synopsis: Participants in our summer teen intensive share original scenes and musical numbers developed over a two-week workshop.
productions.age_recommendation: Ideal for families and friends of teen performers; all ages welcome.

productions.title: Community Choir Collage
productions.subtitle: An Evening of Song and Story
productions.synopsis: Our intergenerational community choir performs an eclectic program of choral works, folk songs, and musical theatre arrangements.

productions.title: City Lights: A Musical Revue
productions.subtitle: Stories of City Life in Song
productions.synopsis: An original musical revue tracing a day in the life of a bustling city through solos, duets, and ensemble numbers drawn from classic and contemporary musicals.

productions.title: Behind the Curtain
productions.subtitle: A Backstage Comedy
productions.synopsis: Everything that can go wrong does go wrong in this madcap comedy about an amateur theatre troupe racing to open their big show.
productions.age_recommendation: Recommended for ages 10+; slapstick humor and mild innuendo.

performances.label: Friday Evening
performances.notes: Family-friendly evening performance with audio description available. Standard seating starts at $18.

performances.label: Friday Evening
performances.notes: Standard Friday night performance. Wheelchair seating available in center and side sections.

performances.label: Friday Evening
performances.notes: Popular weekend performance; additional front-row seats released.

performances.label: Final Friday Evening
performances.notes: Penultimate weekend performance. Limited availability in center section.

performances.label: Saturday Family Matinee
performances.notes: Relaxed performance with a welcoming environment for young children.

performances.label: Sunday Family Matinee
performances.group_discount_note: Groups of 10+ save 15% on standard tickets; call or book online using the group option.
performances.notes: Ideal for school and community groups. Group discounts available for this Sunday matinee.

performances.label: Thursday Evening
performances.notes: Intimate cabaret seating with cocktail tables. Ages 18+ only.

performances.label: Sunday Matinee
performances.notes: Earlier performance time with coffee and dessert available from the lobby bar.

performances.label: Opening Night
performances.group_discount_note: Student and school groups of 12+ receive special musical pricing on select dates.
performances.notes: Includes post-show talkback with the cast and creative team.

performances.label: Saturday Matinee
performances.group_discount_note: Group rates available for 15+ attendees; includes one complimentary ticket for every 20 seats.
performances.notes: Archived performance from the 2025–2026 season, noted for large group attendance.

performances.label: First Fridays Improv
performances.notes: Late-night performance with general admission seating. Content may skew older teens and adults.

performances.label: Sunday Matinee
performances.group_discount_note: Comedy-loving groups of 12+ save 20% on this matinee.
performances.notes: Archived performance frequently referenced in group sales materials.

performances.label: Saturday Evening in the Park
performances.notes: Outdoor performance; lawn seating available. Bring your own blanket or low-back chair.

performances.label: Sunday Youth Showcase
performances.notes: Short, family-friendly performance featuring students from education programs.

class_workshops.title: Teen Acting Intensive: July Session A
class_workshops.description: A two-week acting intensive for teens focusing on scene study, voice, and movement. Students will rehearse contemporary scenes and monologues, building confidence onstage and preparing for a final in-class sharing.

class_workshops.title: Teen Acting Intensive: July Session B
class_workshops.description: A repeat of our popular two-week acting intensive for teens. Ideal for students who want additional practice or who missed the first July session.

class_workshops.title: Kids Summer Theatre Camp (Morning Session)
class_workshops.description: A two-week morning camp where kids explore storytelling, character creation, and simple choreography, culminating in a short showcase for family and friends.

class_workshops.title: Adult Improv for Beginners (May Evenings)
class_workshops.description: Loosen up and learn the fundamentals of improv in a supportive environment. Through games and short-form scenes, adults of all experience levels build spontaneity and listening skills.

class_workshops.title: Teen Musical Theatre Bootcamp
class_workshops.description: A performance-focused bootcamp for teen triple-threats. Students work on group numbers and solos from contemporary musicals, with coaching in acting the song and basic choreography.

class_workshops.title: Stagecraft & Technical Theatre Lab
class_workshops.description: Learn what happens behind the scenes. This hands-on lab introduces lighting, sound, set painting, and basic backstage safety for teens interested in technical theatre.

class_workshops.title: Story Theatre for Kids
class_workshops.description: Young performers bring favorite storybooks to life using ensemble storytelling, simple costumes, and imaginative movement.

class_workshops.title: Adult Scene Study: Contemporary Plays
class_workshops.description: For experienced or returning actors, this class dives into contemporary scenes with a focus on specificity, objectives, and truthful behavior.

class_workshops.title: Family Improv Weekend Workshop
class_workshops.description: A playful weekend workshop for kids, teens, and adults to learn improv games together. Perfect for families looking for a creative outing.

class_workshops.title: Teen Playwriting Online Lab
class_workshops.description: An online workshop where teens develop short plays from concept to first draft, with weekly feedback and writing prompts.

volunteer_signups.name: Alex Gomez
volunteer_signups.comments: Happy to help with seating families; have prior usher experience.

volunteer_signups.name: Jamie Lee
volunteer_signups.comments: Comfortable handling cash and POS system.

volunteer_signups.name: Morgan Davis
volunteer_signups.comments: Can also greet patrons if needed.

volunteer_signups.name: Taylor Nguyen
volunteer_signups.comments: Previous experience with student productions; okay with light lifting.

volunteer_shifts.title: Usher - Charlotte's Web Saturday Matinee
volunteer_shifts.description: Assist patrons with ticket scanning and seating for the Charlotte's Web Saturday family matinee performance.
volunteer_shifts.notes: Please wear black pants and a white or black top. Orientation huddle begins promptly at 1:30 PM.

volunteer_shifts.title: Concessions - Rooftop Romance Sunday Matinee
volunteer_shifts.description: Staff the concessions counter before and during intermission for Rooftop Romance.
volunteer_shifts.notes: Must be 18+ to handle beer and wine sales. Closed-toe shoes required.

volunteer_shifts.title: Box Office - First Fridays Improv Jam
volunteer_shifts.description: Help with will-call, same-day sales, and patron questions for the late-night improv performance.
volunteer_shifts.notes: Comfortable using a simple ticketing system; training provided on arrival.

volunteer_shifts.title: Stagehand - Shakespeare in the Park
volunteer_shifts.description: Assist with set-up, scene shifts, and strike for the outdoor performance of Much Ado About Nothing.
volunteer_shifts.notes: Requires light lifting and working outdoors after dark. Closed-toe shoes and weather-appropriate clothing required.

volunteer_shifts.title: Usher - Charlotte's Web Sunday Family Matinee
volunteer_shifts.description: Welcome families, distribute booster seats, and guide patrons to their seats for the Sunday matinee.
volunteer_shifts.notes: Ideal for first-time front-of-house volunteers. Brief training included at start of shift.

volunteer_shifts.title: Usher - Spring Fling: The Musical Opening Night
volunteer_shifts.description: Provide premium front-of-house service for opening night of Spring Fling: The Musical.
volunteer_shifts.notes: Dress is business casual. Expect a full house and post-show reception in the lobby.

volunteer_shifts.title: Greeter - Kids Take the Stage! Cabaret
volunteer_shifts.description: Welcome families, hand out programs, and direct guests to seating and restrooms.
volunteer_shifts.notes: Great for friendly volunteers who enjoy interacting with kids and parents.

volunteer_shifts.title: Concessions - Charlotte's Web Final Friday
volunteer_shifts.description: Serve snacks and beverages before the show and at intermission for the final Friday of Charlotte's Web.
volunteer_shifts.notes: Training on concessions procedures provided at start of shift.

volunteer_shifts.title: Teaching Assistant - Kids Summer Theatre Camp
volunteer_shifts.description: Support the teaching artist with check-in, activities, and supervision during the morning kids camp.
volunteer_shifts.notes: Background check required for all education volunteers. Returning volunteers preferred.

volunteer_shifts.title: Teaching Assistant - Family Improv Weekend
volunteer_shifts.description: Help set up the studio, demonstrate games, and support families during the Family Improv Weekend workshop.
volunteer_shifts.notes: Comfortable leading icebreakers and working with mixed ages (kids, teens, adults).

volunteer_shifts.title: Administrative Support - Newsletter Prep
volunteer_shifts.description: Assist staff with updating email lists and preparing the quarterly newsletter mailing.
volunteer_shifts.notes: Light computer work; familiarity with spreadsheets helpful but not required.

volunteer_shifts.title: Stagehand - Behind the Curtain Sunday Matinee Prep
volunteer_shifts.description: Assist with pre-show checks, prop presets, and scene shifts for the Behind the Curtain Sunday matinee.
volunteer_shifts.notes: Closed-toe shoes required; some moderate lifting and stair use involved.

ticket_reservations.notes: Standard advance purchase for Friday evening performance.
Discounted Sunday matinee group booking for a community organization.
Cabaret table for two near the stage.
Wheelchair space with adjacent companion seat on house left.
Student group attending late-night improv jam; general admission.
Children of program participants; seated together in center section.
